name: §6Jellyfish
description:
§8Alchemy Pet

§7Health: §c200
§7Health Regen: §c[Health Regen]

§6Radiant Scyphozoa
§7While in dungeons, reduces the mana
§7cost of Power Orbs by §a50%§7.

§6Stored Energy
§7While in dungeons, for every §c2,000
§cHP §7you heal teammates the cooldown
§7of §aWish §7is reduced by §a1s§7, up to
§a30s§7.

§6Powerful Potions
§7While in dungeons, increase the
§7effectiveness of Dungeon Potions by
§a50%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Cute Jellyfish Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aJellyfish§7 pets.

§aThis skin will allow you to swap
§abetween 14 cute versions!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!

§d§lMYTHIC COSMETIC
